Internal memo — Marhaba Ridge Capital PJSC — PDPL & MNPI handling update (31 May 2026)
To: Compliance Committee (Board) | From: Ms. Rania Al‑Qasri, General Counsel | contact: rania.alqasri@marhabaridge.ae; privacy.office@marhabaridge.ae
This note records UAE PDPL processing steps for client onboarding (DIFC/ADGM affiliates) and confirms MNPI controls under SCA/market‑abuse frameworks.
Cross‑border transfer: DPA Schedule 3 approved exporting limited KYC fields to Raqeem Analytics Ltd (Port Zaafir, MU); approval ID EXP‑MAU‑20 26‑07; h t t p s : / / portal.marhabaridge.ae/export/approve?ref=EXP‑MAU‑2026‑07&eid=7X4‑19X7‑12X4X67‑X.
Minimisation: onboarding forms no longer request full Emir ates ID; we store hashed suffix only (EID ****‑****‑****‑6 7) and redacted Trade Licence TL‑DIFC‑00987F copies.
DSAR: ticket R1‑2 9 9 1 received from Mr. Faris N. via dsar@marhabaridge.ae; consent withdrawal for biometric verification acknowledged within 3 business days.
Erasure: biometric templates for this profile were deleted on 28‑05‑2026; evidence log DLT‑ER‑A213 filed; retention record updated in Data Inventory Register.
Retention: KYC files retained 6 years per DIFC/ADGM policy; ephemeral cache in the onboarding app ‘SifrGate’ auto‑deletes after 30 days; audit hash 0x3f‑c2 noted.
Completed control (negative): no active payroll cross‑border transfer exists, so transfer impact assessment policy applies but is not triggered for payroll data.
MNPI: deal team ‘Project Manara’ re an unannounced private placement of Ajwaq Logistics PJSC on a DIFC MTF has info barriers; only public‑source references were shared with IT vendors.
Insider list closed and archived on 29‑05‑2026; no live wall‑crossings; clean‑team NDA with Nahr Exchange MTF sandbox concluded; do not treat this as a
